name: Python 3
updateContentCommand: [ -f packages.txt ] && sudo apt update && sudo apt upgrade -y && sudo xargs apt install -y <packages.txt; [ -f 'Stage 7 - UI Interface/streamlit_app/requirements.txt' ] && pip3 install --user -r 'Stage 7 - UI Interface/streamlit_app/requirements.txt'; if command -v npm >/dev/null 2>&1 && [ -f 'Stage 7 - UI Interface/vercel_vite_app/package.json' ]; then cd 'Stage 7 - UI Interface/vercel_vite_app' && npm install; fi; echo '✅ Packages installed and Requirements met'

postAttachCommand.server: streamlit run 'Stage 7 - UI Interface/streamlit_app/app.py' --server.enableCORS false --server.enableXsrfProtection false
